nl_question: For each customer_state with at least 500 delivered orders, compute the 95th percentile of carrier transit days (order_delivered_carrier_date to order_delivered_customer_date) and the median carrier transit days.
sql: SELECT c."customer_state", COUNT(*) AS delivered_orders, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY DATEDIFF('day', TO_TIMESTAMP(o."order_delivered_carrier_date"), TO_TIMESTAMP(o."order_delivered_customer_date"))) AS p95_carrier_transit_days, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY DATEDIFF('day', TO_TIMESTAMP(o."order_delivered_carrier_date"), TO_TIMESTAMP(o."order_delivered_customer_date"))) AS median_carrier_transit_days FROM BRAZILIAN_E_COMMERCE.BRAZILIAN_E_COMMERCE.OLIST_ORDERS o JOIN BRAZILIAN_E_COMMERCE.BRAZILIAN_E_COMMERCE.OLIST_CUSTOMERS c ON o."customer_id" = c."customer_id" WHERE o."order_status" = 'delivered' AND o."order_delivered_carrier_date" IS NOT NULL AND o."order_delivered_carrier_date" != '' AND o."order_delivered_customer_date" IS NOT NULL AND o."order_delivered_customer_date" != '' GROUP BY c."customer_state" HAVING COUNT(*) >= 500 ORDER BY c."customer_state"
